default_binding.THRESHOLD: the wide night sky above the sleepy meadow
default_binding.ENTRANCE: her very own spot in the sky
default_binding.OPENING_MOMENT: dusk, as the sky turns soft purple
default_binding.LOW_HOUSES: little houses with warm yellow windows

slots.meaning: The child protagonist, a tiny star on her first night to shine.
slots.guidance: A single small, kid-relatable protagonist (name or role); gentle and a little shy, not reckless.

slots.meaning: The hero's epithet: what kind of small, new thing she is.
slots.guidance: A short, warm descriptor used at her introduction and in closing lines (e.g. 'the littlest star'); never frightening.

slots.meaning: The hero's gentle guide who is present throughout the night.
slots.guidance: Kind, calm, encouraging; never a source of peril; reacts with warmth (smiles, hums, chuckles kindly).

slots.meaning: The whole bounded, gentle place the story happens inside.
slots.guidance: One open, cozy expanse the hero shines from; wonder over dread; no lethal hazards, no toxic air, nothing frightening.

slots.meaning: The hero's cozy resting place where she wakes at the story's start.
slots.guidance: A soft, safe place to sleep/wake; purely comforting imagery.

slots.meaning: The hero's own spot, the destination she must return to and finally shine from.
slots.guidance: Always reachable and safe to reach; the hub every retry loop floats back to.

slots.meaning: The moment/condition that makes tonight the hero's first night to shine.
slots.guidance: A gentle, recurring nightly moment (dusk, a particular gathering of light); non-lethal, calm.

slots.meaning: The small physical feature the hero squeezes or shakes when nervous or wiggling.
slots.guidance: A bare, harmless body part/feature natural to the hero's form (e.g. points, ears, wings); never a weapon-like feature.

slots.meaning: The gentle helper thing the hero can grab to climb back up or to hold while shining.
slots.guidance: A soft, safe, liftable/climbable aid; no equipment that could injure.

slots.meaning: The sleepy watchers below who are waiting for the hero's light.
slots.guidance: Warm, cozy household imagery; the children are never in danger.

slots.meaning: The hiding-and-resting strategy the hero can try first (route A).
slots.guidance: A soft, cozy hiding spot; comforting, never isolating in a scary way.

slots.meaning: The energetic wake-up-the-sparkle strategy the hero can try (route B).
slots.guidance: A fun, wobbly, silly movement; playful, never dangerous.

slots.meaning: The peek-at-the-world-below strategy the hero can try (route C).
slots.guidance: A safe, low vantage point to look around from; nothing to fall into harm from.

slots.meaning: The small friendly creature the hero's first tiny sparkle reaches on route A.
slots.guidance: A tiny, harmless, friendly creature that answers the hero's light with its own.

slots.meaning: The soft place the hero tumbles onto after wiggling too fast (route B retry).
slots.guidance: A soft, giggle-inducing landing spot; a comic pratfall, never a real fall.

slots.meaning: The gently swaying scenery far below that the hero's sway mirrors (route B forward).
slots.guidance: A calm, swaying natural image; purely soothing.

slots.meaning: The sparkly shake-off the hero's wiggle produces (route B).
slots.guidance: A fun, sparkly visual with no hazard.

slots.meaning: The low point the hero slips down to on route C before recovering.
slots.guidance: A safe, soft-landing low point; the slip is silly, never a dangerous fall.

slots.meaning: The cozy homes the hero sees from down low on route C.
slots.guidance: Warm, inviting household imagery seen from a safe distance.

slots.meaning: The soft song the hero and companion can sing together at the end.
slots.guidance: A gentle, sleepy tune; purely comforting.

slots.meaning: The other small lights the hero can invite to shine alongside her.
slots.guidance: Friendly peers who join happily; never rivals or a source of exclusion.

slots.meaning: Ending: winking goodnight to the watchers below (completion). Names ending end_goodnight.
slots.guidance: Positive, calm, sleepy imagery; the closing half of the 'Goodnight, ...' title.

slots.meaning: Ending: singing the world to sleep with the companion (success). Names ending end_lullaby.
slots.guidance: Positive; a single warm word naming the song/ending, combined with {HERO} in the title.

slots.meaning: Ending: inviting the other little lights to shine together (success). Names ending end_friends.
slots.guidance: Positive; the full ending title naming a sky/place full of joined friends.
